claimText: UT Austin graduate-education recommendations say students should remain accountable as the sole intellectual author of milestone work and should never cite AI as an author.
normalizedValue: Graduate milestone recommendations keep student authorship/accountability central and reject AI authorship.

citation.citationTitle: AI Use in Graduate Education - Office of the Executive Vice President and Provost
